title: Lead Revenue Manager at Air India SATS

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Air India SATS
jsonLd.description:
We at Air India SATS are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Air India SATS:
Air India SATS is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
